question: Which customers have total order quantity greater than 1? Give me the customer names.
sql: SELECT Name FROM customer WHERE Customer_ID IN (SELECT Customer_ID FROM customer_order GROUP BY Customer_ID HAVING SUM(Quantity) > 1);

back_translation.intent: 获取购买总量超过1的客户的姓名
filters: Customer_ID IN (SELECT Customer_ID FROM customer_order GROUP BY Customer_ID HAVING SUM(Quantity) > 1)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题中'购买总量超过1的客户姓名'的意图，包括涉及的表、列、过滤条件和聚合操作。
